item.title: A free post anyone can read
item.description: The teaser line for the free post.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan McLernon
item.content:encoded:
This is the complete free body of the post. It is fully readable from the public RSS feed because the author published it to everyone, so there is no paywall container anywhere in the markup and the reader gets the whole thing.

The full text continues here with the second paragraph that develops the idea further so the body is unmistakably a complete article rather than a short lead-in teaser.

item.title: A paid post that only shows a teaser
item.description: The teaser line for the paid post.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan McLernon
item.content:encoded:
This is the visible lead-in to a paid post.

This post is for paid subscribers

Subscribe
